metadata.summary: Base plugin for nmk build system

documentation:
# nmk-base
Base plugin for nmk build system

<!-- NMK-BADGES-BEGIN -->
[![License: MPL](https://img.shields.io/github/license/dynod/nmk-base?color=green)](https://github.com/dynod/nmk-base/blob/main/LICENSE)
[![Checks](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/dynod/nmk-base/build.yml?branch=main&label=build%20%26%20u.t.)](https://github.com/dynod/nmk-base/actions?query=branch%3Amain)
[![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-search/dynod/nmk?label=issues&query=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Aplugin%3Abase)](https://github.com/dynod/nmk/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Aplugin%3Abase)
[![Supported python versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.9%20--%203.12-blue)](https://www.python.org/)
[![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/nmk-base)](https://pypi.org/project/nmk-base/)
[![Code style: ruff](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20style-ruff-000000.svg)](https://astral.sh/ruff)
[![Ruff analysis result](https://img.shields.io/badge/ruff-0-green)](https://astral.sh/ruff)
[![Code coverage](https://img.shields.io/codecov/c/github/dynod/nmk-base)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/dynod/nmk-base)
[![Documentation Status](https://readthedocs.org/projects/nmk-base/badge/?version=stable)](https://nmk-base.readthedocs.io/)
<!-- NMK-BADGES-END -->

This plugin provides base features for **`nmk`** build, which by design don't need to be part of the **`nmk`** core implementation.

## Usage

To use this plugin in your **`nmk`** project, insert this reference:
```yaml
refs:
    - pip://nmk-base!plugin.yml
```

## Documentation

This plugin documentation is available [here](https://nmk-base.readthedocs.io/)

## Issues

Issues for this plugin shall be reported on the [main  **`nmk`** project](https://github.com/dynod/nmk/issues), using the **plugin:base** label.

modules.name: nmk_base.sysdeps
documentation: Python module for system dependencies check

classes.name: nmk_base.sysdeps.SystemDepsCheckBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.sysdeps.SystemDepsCheckBuilder.build
documentation:
Verify system dependencies

Iterate on required dependencies, check them, and stop with install instructions if they're not found

```
param deps

Map of system requirements + install instructions
```
Builder logic for **sys.deps** task

modules.name: nmk_base.resolvers
documentation: Python module for base resolvers (to be used by other plugins).

classes.name: nmk_base.resolvers.FilesResolver

methods.name: nmk_base.resolvers.FilesResolver.folder_config
documentation:
Must be overridden by sub-classes. This property is used to identify the config item identifying the folder(s) where to search files.

```
return

Name of the config item holding the folder(s) to be searched for files
```

methods.name: nmk_base.resolvers.FilesResolver.extension
documentation:
Can be overridden by sub-classes. This property is used to identify the extension of files to be searched

```
return

Extension to be searched in folder(s); Default is "."
```

methods.name: nmk_base.resolvers.FilesResolver.get_value
documentation:
Files resolution logic:
iterate on provided folders (from config item name), and filter on provided extension.

```
return

List of found files
```
Base resolver class helping for files resolution.

modules.name: nmk_base.helpers
documentation: Python module for **nmk-base** helper tasks.

classes.name: nmk_base.helpers.InfoBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.helpers.InfoBuilder.display_info
documentation:
Iterate on information dictionnary content, and display it with aligned colons

```
param info

Information dictionnary
```
Common implementation for information display tasks

classes.name: nmk_base.helpers.VersionBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.helpers.VersionBuilder.build
documentation:
Build logic for **version** task:
iterate on provided plugins version map and display them.

```
param plugins

Map of plugins versions
```
Builder implementation for **version** task

classes.name: nmk_base.helpers.HelpBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.helpers.HelpBuilder.build
documentation:
Build logic for **help** task:
iterate on provided plugins help links map and display them.

```
param links

Map of plugins help links
```
Builder implementation for **help** task

classes.name: nmk_base.helpers.TaskListBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.helpers.TaskListBuilder.build
documentation:
Build logic for **tasks** task:
iterate on build model tasks, and display them (with their emoji and description text)
Builder implementation for **tasks** task

modules.name: nmk_base
documentation: Python module for **nmk-base** plugin code.

variables.name: nmk_base.__title__
documentation: Module name

variables.name: nmk_base.__version__
documentation: Module version, dynamically resolved from installed package

modules.name: nmk_base.venvbuilder
documentation: Python module for **nmk-base** venv tasks.

classes.name: nmk_base.venvbuilder.ExeResolver

methods.name: nmk_base.venvbuilder.ExeResolver.get_value
documentation: Resolution logic: returns sys.executable
Resolver class for **venvPython** config item

classes.name: nmk_base.venvbuilder.BinResolver

methods.name: nmk_base.venvbuilder.BinResolver.get_value
documentation: Resolution logic: returns sys.executable parent folder
Resolver class for **venvBin** config item

classes.name: nmk_base.venvbuilder.FileDepsContentResolver

methods.name: nmk_base.venvbuilder.FileDepsContentResolver.get_value
documentation: Resolution logic: merge content from files listed in **venvFileDeps** config item
Resolver class for **venvFileDepsContent** config item

classes.name: nmk_base.venvbuilder.VenvUpdateBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.venvbuilder.VenvUpdateBuilder.build
documentation:
Build logic for **py.venv** task:
calls **pip install** with generated requirements file, then **pip freeze** to list all dependencies in secondary output file.

```
param pip_args

Extra arguments to be used when invoking pip install
```
Builder for **py.venv** task

modules.name: nmk_base.version
documentation: Python module for **nmk-base** version resolvers.

classes.name: nmk_base.version.VersionResolver

methods.name: nmk_base.version.VersionResolver.get_version
documentation:
Abstract method (to be overridden by subclasses), called by resolver to get plugin version.

:returns: Plugin version string

methods.name: nmk_base.version.VersionResolver.get_value
documentation:
Returns version string (returned by **get_version** method)

```
param name

Config item name (unused)

returns

Version string
```
Base class for nmk plugins version resolvers

classes.name: nmk_base.version.NmkBaseVersionResolver

methods.name: nmk_base.version.NmkBaseVersionResolver.get_version
documentation:
Returns **nmk_base** module version

:returns: Module version
Resolver for **nmkBasePluginVersion** config item

modules.name: nmk_base.buildenv
documentation: Python module for **buildenv** extension and tasks

classes.name: nmk_base.buildenv.BuildEnvInit

methods.name: nmk_base.buildenv.BuildEnvInit.init
documentation:
Buildenv init call back for nmk

When called, this method:

* registers **nmk** command for completion
* calls **nmk setup** if project contains an **nmk.yml** file

methods.name: nmk_base.buildenv.BuildEnvInit.get_version
documentation: Get extension version
Buildenv extension for **nmk**

classes.name: nmk_base.buildenv.BuildenvInitBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.buildenv.BuildenvInitBuilder._venv_bin_path
documentation: Venv path access

methods.name: nmk_base.buildenv.BuildenvInitBuilder.build
documentation: Triggers BuildEnvManager init, in order to refresh buildenv loading scripts
**buildenv** task builder

modules.name: nmk_base.git
documentation: Python module for **nmk-base** git related resolvers and builders.

classes.name: nmk_base.git.GitVersionRefresh

methods.name: nmk_base.git.GitVersionRefresh.build
documentation:
Build logic for **git.version** task:
update .gitversion only if it doesn't exist or if its content doesn't match current version.

```
param version

Current build version
```
Builder for **git.version** task

classes.name: nmk_base.git.GitClean

methods.name: nmk_base.git.GitClean.build
documentation:
Build logic for **git.clean** task:
simply run **git clean -fdX** command, and stop build

:throw: NmkStopHereError to interrupt current build now
Builder for **git.clean** task

classes.name: nmk_base.git.GitVersionResolver

methods.name: nmk_base.git.GitVersionResolver.get_value
documentation:
Resolution logic for **gitVersion** config item:
call commands to deduce version from last git tag

```
param name

Config item name

returns

Config item value
```
Resolver for **gitVersion** config item

classes.name: nmk_base.git.GitFileFragmentUpdater

methods.name: nmk_base.git.GitFileFragmentUpdater.allow_missing_input
documentation:
Tells nmk that project root .gitignore/.gitattributes can be missing

```
param missing_input

path to missing input

returns

True if this is the task main input (e.g. .gitIgnore)
```

methods.name: nmk_base.git.GitFileFragmentUpdater.build_fragment
documentation:
Build fragment to be inserted in file that can be also manually edited

```
param kwargs

keywords for template rendering

param template

Path to generated file template
```
Abstract builder for git-related files

classes.name: nmk_base.git.GitIgnore

methods.name: nmk_base.git.GitIgnore.prepare_ignored_file
documentation:
Prepare ignored file path by making it relative to project path (is possible)

```
param ignored_file

Path to ignored file

returns

Projet relative path if possible, unchanged input value otherwise
```

methods.name: nmk_base.git.GitIgnore.build
documentation:
Generate .gitignore file fragment from template

```
param ignored_files

List of files to be ignored

param template

Path to generated file template
```
Builder for **git.ignore** task

classes.name: nmk_base.git.GitAttributes

methods.name: nmk_base.git.GitAttributes.build
documentation:
Generate .gitattributes file fragment from template

```
param template

Path to generated file template
```
Builder for **git.attributes** task

classes.name: nmk_base.git.GitIsDirty

methods.name: nmk_base.git.GitIsDirty.build
documentation: Build logic for **git.dirty** task: verifies if **git status --porcelain** output is empty
Builder for **git.dirty** task

classes.name: nmk_base.git.CIResolver

methods.name: nmk_base.git.CIResolver.get_value
documentation: Resolution logic for **gitEnableDirtyCheck**: check if **CI** env var is defined
Resolver for **gitEnableDirtyCheck** config item override

modules.name: nmk_base.common
documentation: Python module for **nmk-base** utility classes.

classes.name: nmk_base.common.TemplateBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.common.TemplateBuilder.relative_path
documentation:
Make an absolute path as project relative if possible

```
param v

Path string to be converted

return

Project relative path (if possible); unchanged input value otherwise
```

methods.name: nmk_base.common.TemplateBuilder.config_value
documentation:
Get config value by name & turn absolute paths to project relative ones (if possible)

```
param config_name

Config item name

return

Config item value
```

methods.name: nmk_base.common.TemplateBuilder.render_template
documentation:
Render template into a string, with provided keywords and config items

```
param template

Path to template file to be rendered

param kwargs

Map of keywords for templates rendering, indexed by name

return

Rendered template string

throw

AssertionError if unknown keyword is referenced in template
```

methods.name: nmk_base.common.TemplateBuilder.build_from_template
documentation:
Generate file from template

```
param template

Path to template file to be rendered

param output

Path to output file to be generated

param kwargs

Map of keywords for templates rendering, indexed by name

return

Rendered template string

throw

AssertionError if unknown keyword is referenced in template
```

methods.name: nmk_base.common.TemplateBuilder.build
documentation:
Default build behavior: generate main output file from provided template

```
param template

Path to the Jinja template to use for generation

param kwargs

Map of keywords for templates rendering, indexed by name
```
Generic builder logic to generate files from templates

classes.name: nmk_base.common.TomlFileBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.common.TomlFileBuilder._check_paths
documentation: Handle relative path for all contributions

methods.name: nmk_base.common.TomlFileBuilder._contribute
documentation:
Merge items from **update** dictionary into **main** one.
Merge logic for existing items is:

- for lists: new items are appended after existing ones
- for dictionaries: existing dictionary is updated with new one content
- for other types: existing values are replaces with new ones

```
param main

Settings dictionary to be updated

param update

Update dictionary to be merged into the existing one
```

methods.name: nmk_base.common.TomlFileBuilder.build
documentation:
Generates toml file from fragments and items

```
param fragment_files

List of fragment files (processed as Jinja templates) to be merged

param items

Dict of toml items to be merged

param plugin_name

Plugin name to be inserted in generated file heading comment

param kwargs

Map of keywords for templates rendering, indexed by name
```
Generic builder logic to generate TOML files from templates and contributed items

classes.name: nmk_base.common.MkdirBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.common.MkdirBuilder.build
documentation:
Build logic:
create specified directory (main output of the task)
Generic builder logic to create directory

classes.name: nmk_base.common.ProcessBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.common.ProcessBuilder.build
documentation:
Build logic:

- call subprocess specified through **cmd** parameter; process is invoked in project directory
- depending on the **verbose** parameter, redirect output to stdout (if True) or to nmk logs (if False)
- touch the specified output file

```
param cmd

process command line; may be a string or a list of parameters

param verbose

states if the process output shall be displayed in stdout or saved in logs
```
Generic builder logic to call a sub-process

classes.name: nmk_base.common.CleanBuilder

methods.name: nmk_base.common.CleanBuilder.build
documentation:
Build logic: delete (recursively) provided directory, if it exists

```
param path

Directory to be deleted
```
Generic builder logic to clean a directory
